ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine sold */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine model */,
  "datasource" TEXT /* Source of the sales data */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the sale */,
  "sale_location" TEXT /* Location of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (new, used, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine model */,
  "year_made" INTEGER /* Year the machine was made */,
  "datasource" TEXT /* Source of the machine data */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the machine */,
  "engine_hours" TEXT /* Total engine hours of the machine */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of machine (hydraulic, electric, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the model */,
  "model_length" TEXT /* Length of the model */,
  "model_width" TEXT /* Width of the model */,
  "model_height" TEXT /* Height of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of utilization */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of utilization */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of utilization */,
  "hours_used" TEXT /* Hours the machine was used */,
  "fuel_consumption" TEXT /* Fuel consumption during utilization */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who used the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utilization_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utilization_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_cost" TEXT /* Cost of maintenance */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_customers" (
  "sales_customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales-customer record */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customers_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_customers" (
  "machine_customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine-customer record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_customers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_customers_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_operators" (
  "machine_operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine-operator record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_operators_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_operators_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_technicians" (
  "machine_technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine-technician record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_technicians_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_technicians_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

Total engine hours of the machine
Unique identifier for each utilization record
ID of the operator who used the machine
Unique identifier for each maintenance record
